metadata.description: Metering and cost tracking attached to compute resources managed by other providers. Unlike infrastructure types it provisions VISIBILITY (metering, overhead distribution, financial tracking), not infrastructure — a long-running observational Process realized by a cost provider (e.g. Red Hat Lightspeed Cost Management / Project Koku). UDLM-correct translation of the `cost` serviceType in dcm-project/enhancements#60: this type carries the cost MODEL (the rate table — declarative data); the provider COMPUTES the cost (metering x rate, overhead distribution — Policy), publishing the result as typed Realized outputs. The metered target is a typed relationship resolved on the instance, not an id baked into the type spec.

target.description: What kind of resource this meter tracks. The SPECIFIC resource(s) are bound on the instance via the `references` relationship (the realized edge carries the target uuid) — the type carries only the declarative type selector, never an instance id (T-data: noun, not a baked-in reference).

resourceType.description: Resource Type name of the metered target (dcm#60 `target.resource_type`; default there was `cluster`).

costModel.description: Rate configuration. ABSENT = basic metering only (tier 1 — usage data flows, no cost). PRESENT without `rates` = distribution only (tier 2 — overhead categorized). PRESENT with `rates` = full cost (tier 3). The tier is derived purely from what is present in the spec (E3, presence-conditional) — no expression language; the actual `cost = metering x rate` is the provider's act (Policy), not carried here.

rates.description: Tiered rate definitions. Each rate is declarative data; applying it to usage is Policy.

distribution.description: Method for distributing shared overhead across metered resources.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for rate values and computed cost.

meteredUsage.description: Raw usage metrics observed for the target over the period (tier 1+). The provider's realized observation.

computedCost.description: Cost for the period = metering x rate (+ markup), present only at tier 3. The output of the provider's computation; the formula itself is Policy and is NOT carried in the spec (G2).

costBreakdown.description: Overhead distribution result by the configured method (tier 2+).

currency.description: Currency of `computedCost` (echoes the realized spec value).

relationships.description: Meters a cluster. Cross-cutting reference (applies-to), not a lifecycle dependency — the target's lifecycle is independent (T4). At least one target across all reference edges is required at instance time (enforced by Policy).
